name: ablejam
description: Setlist manager for Ableton Live — inspired by AbleSet, made our own.

scripts.live: pnpm --filter @ablejam/web run build && pnpm --filter @ablejam/host run start
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @ablejam/host exec tsx ../../packages/shared/test/notation.test.ts && pnpm --filter @ablejam/host exec tsx ../../packages/host/test/setlist.test.ts
